column1: AI Adoption by Industry Sector — Global (McKinsey + IBM + PwC + Stanford AI Index 2023-2025)
Adoption Rate = % of organisations in that sector using AI in ≥1 function. 2025 data from McKinsey Rewiring + Agents report.

column7: Highest adopter. McKinsey 2024: tech sector leads. 90% of notable AI models from industry (Stanford 2025).
